actionUnits.condition: EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id: 954951897, m_Script guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) has m_Delegates with eventID 4 (PointerClick). Its callback m_Calls targets MonoBehaviour id 954951893 (guid: ed3b45ff7bbab2146bc55b624801e08e, script class: Government) invoking public method 'showlabel'. Expected behavior: Government.Start has run to cache Player->child(1) TextMeshPro. On click, showlabel sets the label text to the first 20 chars of 'Government:Financial Department', i.e., 'Government:Financial'.

EventTrigger component (id: 954951897, guid: d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building91 registers eventID 4 (PointerClick) to call Government.showlabel on MonoBehaviour id 954951893 (guid: ed3b45ff7bbab2146bc55b624801e08e). Expect Start() has cached Player->child(1) as label; showlabel sets TextMeshPro.text to GetLabel().Substring(0,20) for name 'Building91'.
